title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 12 2022
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 12 2022
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 12 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 12/04/2022
DCE iron ore futures open lower and go higher，an increase of 4.40%throughout the day, the main contract closed 797.5. the quotation inthe morning was increased by 10 yuan/mt over yesterday, and continue to increase 10-20 yuan as the disk rise. some traders were active to sell, steel mills purchased on demand.
